task_completion.description: Create 'Library API - Overview' with resource types table and API description
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Library API - Overview' shows a description of the library system API and a table of major resource types with endpoints and supported methods.

task_completion.description: Create 'Library API - Authentication Guide' with auth methods table and code example
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Library API - Authentication Guide' shows authentication methods table, OAuth/token information, and at least one code snippet showing how to include auth headers.

task_completion.description: Create 'Library API - Endpoints Reference' with table of 8+ endpoints grouped by resource
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Library API - Endpoints Reference' shows a table with 8 or more rows covering HTTP methods, endpoint paths, descriptions, and auth requirements for Books, Patrons, and Loans resources.

task_completion.description: Create 'Library API - Error Codes Reference' with table of 8+ error codes
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Library API - Error Codes Reference' shows a table with at least 8 HTTP error status codes (400, 401, 403, 404, etc.) with error messages and resolution guidance.

task_completion.description: Create 'Library API - Changelog' with version history table of 4+ versions
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Library API - Changelog' shows a version history table with 4 or more versions, release dates, changes summary, and breaking changes column.
Each tiddler shows both 'API-Documentation' and 'LibrarySystem' tag pills.
Tiddlers contain clickable [[wikilinks]] referencing other Library API tiddlers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki browser interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Firefox with TiddlyWiki open, tiddler editing dialogs visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires 5 tiddlers: 'Library API - Overview', 'Library API - Authentication Guide' (must have code example), 'Library API - Endpoints Reference' (8+ endpoint rows), 'Library API - Error Codes Reference' (8+ error code rows), 'Library API - Changelog' (4+ version rows). All tagged 'API-Documentation' and 'LibrarySystem'.
